blockingIssues.description: Load Backup uses BackLink label 'Back' instead of required 'Back to Welcome' (VAL-IMP-001 / Paper import load-backup copy).
Validator copy format mismatches required import strings by rendering '2 of 3' and 'Share #1 (Index 1)' instead of '2/3' and 'Share #1' in Import load/decrypt screens.
Corrupted error variant renders 'Back to Import' as secondary/ghost CTA, but contract/Paper require a single primary CTA for that variant (VAL-IMP-005).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep feature copy examples aligned with validation-contract and Paper literals for import flow to avoid implementing/testing non-canonical text variants.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review flagged features.json import examples using '(2 of 3) · Share #1 (Index 1)' while validation-contract and Paper require '(2/3) · Share #1'.
